name: Deon Cole
bio: Deon Cole is an American stand-up comedian, actor, and writer from the South Side of Chicago, known for his dry, deadpan delivery and observational riffs. He wrote for Conan and the Tonight Show before becoming a fixture as Charlie Telphy on the ABC sitcom Black-ish and its spinoffs. He has released multiple hour specials on Comedy Central and Netflix.

timeline.ev: Joins the writing staff of Conan
Begins recurring role as Charlie on Black-ish
Comedy Central special Cole Blooded Seminar airs
Fourth Netflix special, Ok Mister, premieres

accolades: Multiple NAACP Image Awards for Black-ish
Four hour-long stand-up specials across Comedy Central and Netflix

bits.t: Met A New Friend in a Weird Way
